tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('information_schema','pg_catalog') ORDER BY table_name;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests' ORDER BY ordinal_position;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'linear_issues' ORDER BY ordinal_position;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT gpr.number AS pr_number, gpr.closes_linear AS linear_issue_id, li.state AS linear_state
FROM github_pull_requests gpr
JOIN linear_issues li ON gpr.closes_linear = li.id
WHERE gpr.state = 'merged'
  AND li.state <> 'done'
ORDER BY gpr.number;"}
